data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-language support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-language support feature, but the provided evidence does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-language support, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that this feature is implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of multi-language support functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-language support requirement.
